name: Gewicht Tracker
description: Track je gewichtsverlies met grafieken en statistieken

icons.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 192 192'><defs><style>.icon-bg{fill:%23667eea}.icon-text{fill:white;font-size:80px;font-weight:bold;font-family:Arial}.icon-emoji{font-size:100px}</style></defs><rect class='icon-bg' width='192' height='192'/><text class='icon-emoji' x='96' y='130' text-anchor='middle'>⚖️</text></svg>

data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 512 512'><defs><style>.icon-bg{fill:%23667eea}.icon-emoji{font-size:300px}</style></defs><rect class='icon-bg' width='512' height='512'/><text class='icon-emoji' x='256' y='370' text-anchor='middle'>⚖️</text></svg>

data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 180'><defs><style>.icon-bg{fill:%23667eea}.icon-emoji{font-size:90px}</style></defs><rect class='icon-bg' width='180' height='180' rx='40'/><text class='icon-emoji' x='90' y='130' text-anchor='middle'>⚖️</text></svg>
